response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at Optilyz, plus current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD), polyglot proficiency, and demonstrated end-to-end ownership across web/mobile/embedded. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at production scale (millions of mails, millions of req/s elsewhere)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, code reviews, and architecture contributions across multiple senior roles
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack listed by the role
Kotlin experience not evidenced; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Heavy investment in DLang across multiple roles may indicate stack preferences that diverge from the team's TypeScript-first direction
